# Theme Settings

ɳClaw desktop supports customizable light/dark themes and accent colors.

## Theme Modes

**System** (default): Follows OS preference. Switches automatically when OS theme changes.

**Light**: Forces light theme regardless of OS setting.

**Dark**: Forces dark theme regardless of OS setting.

## Accent Colors

Six built-in presets: Sky (default), Violet, Emerald, Amber, Rose, Slate.

Custom colors: Enter any valid hex value (#RRGGBB or #RRGGBBAA) and click Apply.

## Persistence

Theme and accent choices save to browser local storage. They persist across app restarts.

## Reset

The Reset button restores System theme + Sky accent (#0ea5e9).
